description: The municipal Inspector General's office has obtained a vendor payment extract from the City of Chicago Open Data Portal at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/chicago_vendor_payments.xlsx. Perform a comprehensive forensic financial analysis including Benford's Law digit distribution, duplicate payment detection, vendor concentration, amount patterns (round numbers and threshold structuring), and temporal patterns (weekend/holiday and month-end clustering). Save the completed forensic audit workbook, including a summary of findings with risk ratings and recommendations, to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/forensic_audit_report.xlsx

metadata.data_source: City of Chicago Open Data Portal - Vendor Payments
metadata.evaluation_approach: methodology-based - evaluates forensic analysis techniques applied rather than specific anomaly detection
